name: Ricky Jones

contactInfo.office: 200 N. Kaufman St., Mount Vernon, TX 75457

bio: Ricky Jones serves as the Franklin County Sheriff, protecting the citizens of Franklin County from the county seat of Mount Vernon. Sheriff Jones provides dedicated law enforcement services to this rural East Texas community.
campaignPromises: Provide rapid response to calls throughout Franklin County
Maintain strong relationships with the communities we serve
Protect Lake Cypress Springs recreational areas
Keep overhead costs low while maintaining quality service
Ensure the county jail meets all state standards
